text.title: idea-generation Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for idea-generation as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Agent produces "AI-powered X", "smart Y for developers" across all 7 frameworks under default settings.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: These labels are the statistical mode of solopreneur startup content in training data. Every framework converges to the same outputs without diversity forcing.

failure-mode.description: Agent assigns confident market size numbers ($500M, $1B) without any citation in the scoring step.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: LLMs produce round-number TAM figures anchored on frequently seen startup deck numbers in training data.

failure-mode.description: Agent generates ideas without knowing actual skill depth; output skews toward lexically common categories (SaaS) and undercounts service and info-product opportunities.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: LLMs fill missing personal context with training-data defaults.
